summary: Iteration 45: ASI-GRADE FORENSIC E2E AUDIT for user andre@thestrategysquad.com.au. User is in UNCALIBRATED state (NEEDS_CALIBRATION authState), so all protected pages redirect to /calibration except /settings which is in allowedPaths. Tested 17+ routes on desktop (1920x800) and 4 mobile pages (390x844). Key findings: /settings loads with full sidebar, 4 tabs, and business_stage/growth_goals/risk_profile selects. /calibration shows 'Welcome to BIQc, Andre' with website URL input and Begin Audit button. Mobile pages render correctly with responsive layout.

context_for_next_testing_agent: User andre@thestrategysquad.com.au is in UNCALIBRATED state. To test protected pages, user must complete calibration flow first by: (1) Go to /calibration, (2) Enter website URL or click 'I don't have a website', (3) Complete the audit/calibration wizard. Once calibrated, authState changes to READY and all protected pages become accessible. The Settings page (/settings) is accessible even when uncalibrated and shows all form fields with empty state. Sidebar navigation is fully functional with 5 sections: INTELLIGENCE (BIQc Insights, Strategic Console, Board Room, Operator View, SoundBoard), ANALYSIS (Diagnosis, Analysis, Market Analysis, Intel Centre), TOOLS (SOP Generator, Data Center, Documents), CONFIGURATION (Intelligence Baseline, Business DNA, Integrations, Email, Email Inbox, Calendar), SETTINGS (Settings).

/calibration.notes: Shows 'Welcome to BIQc, Andre', Begin Audit button, website URL input

/settings.notes: Full sidebar, 4 tabs, business_stage/growth_goals/risk_profile selects visible

/business-profile.notes: NOT in allowedPaths - redirects to calibration

/war-room.notes: Expected - requires calibration (code verified '← Dashboard' button exists)

/login-supabase.notes: Form fills viewport, Titan Glass right panel hidden, OAuth buttons visible

/register-supabase.notes: Confirm Password field visible on scroll, all 6 input fields present

/settings.notes: Hamburger menu, calibration banner, account information visible

auth_method_used: Supabase magic link via POST /auth/v1/admin/generate_link + POST /auth/v1/verify with token_hash
